---
title: "Final Project - Predicting PDAC with Circulating miRNA - RF Only"
authors: "Madison Blake, Kristyn Gumpper-Fedus, Sean Kirkpatrick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Predicting PDAC with Circulating miRNA - Random Forest Only

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

dir.create("Data", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

source("R/model_only_report_helpers.R")
source("R/run_fold_rf.R")
source("R/run_limma_paired.R")
source("R/differential_expression_filter_fn.R")
```

```{r constants, include=FALSE}
set.seed(31415)

normalized_data_file <- "Data/GSE314577/GSE314577_VUMC_miRNA_normalized_data.xlsx"
metadata_file <- "Data/GSE314577/GSE314577_VUMC_Metadata_ch_revised.xlsx"
limma_rds_file <- "Data/Full train_filter_results.rds"

log2_pseudocount <- 1
run_limma_analysis <- FALSE
train_fraction <- 0.8
k <- 5

fold_filter_top_n <- 25
rf_ntree <- 5000
rf_mtry_grid <- c(5L, 10L, 20L, 30L)
rf_top_m_features <- 10
rf_importance_metric <- "MeanDecreaseAccuracy"
rf_importance_plot_top_n <- max(20L, rf_top_m_features)

demographic_covariates <- c("Sex", "Race", "Age")
factor_demographic_covariates <- c("Sex", "Race")
use_model_covariates <- TRUE
model_covariates <- if (use_model_covariates) demographic_covariates else character(0)

limma_group_term <- "CC"
limma_adjustment_covariates <- demographic_covariates
filter_stat_cols <- c(
  "miRNA",
  "mean_control",
  "mean_case",
  "mean_diff",
  "limma_log_fc",
  "limma_avg_expr",
  "limma_t",
  "limma_p_value",
  "limma_adj_p_value",
  "limma_b"
)
```

```{r shared_inputs, include=FALSE}
analysis_inputs <- load_model_only_pipeline_data(
  normalized_data_file = normalized_data_file,
  metadata_file = metadata_file,
  log2_pseudocount = log2_pseudocount,
  train_fraction = train_fraction,
  run_limma_analysis = run_limma_analysis,
  limma_rds_file = limma_rds_file,
  filter_stat_cols = filter_stat_cols,
  fold_filter_top_n = fold_filter_top_n,
  limma_group_term = limma_group_term,
  limma_adjustment_covariates = limma_adjustment_covariates
)

train_set <- analysis_inputs$train_set
holdout <- analysis_inputs$holdout
train_filter_results <- analysis_inputs$train_filter_results
miRNA_all_columns <- analysis_inputs$miRNA_all_columns
```

```{r model_feature_pool, include=FALSE}
rf_selected_miRNA <- miRNA_all_columns
```

```{r model_run, include=FALSE}
model_runner <- function(fold_inputs) {
  rf_runner <- get("run_fold_rf", mode = "function")

  rf_runner(
    fold_inputs,
    ntree = rf_ntree,
    mtry_grid = rf_mtry_grid,
    top_m_features = rf_top_m_features,
    importance_metric = rf_importance_metric
  )
}

cv_results <- run_single_model_cv(
  train_set = train_set,
  k = k,
  selected_miRNA = rf_selected_miRNA,
  model_name = "random_forest",
  model_runner = model_runner,
  model_covariates = model_covariates,
  factor_model_covariates = factor_demographic_covariates
)

holdout_results <- run_single_model_holdout(
  train_set = train_set,
  holdout = holdout,
  selected_miRNA = rf_selected_miRNA,
  model_name = "random_forest",
  model_runner = model_runner,
  model_covariates = model_covariates,
  factor_model_covariates = factor_demographic_covariates
)
```

```{r final_objects, include=FALSE}
rf_results <- list(
  train_filter_results = train_filter_results,
  preselected_miRNA = rf_selected_miRNA,
  selected_miRNA = holdout_results$final_model_output$selected_miRNA,
  cv_predictions = cv_results$cv_predictions,
  cv_tuning = cv_results$cv_tuning,
  cv_feature_counts = cv_results$cv_feature_counts,
  cv_preselected_feature_counts = cv_results$cv_preselected_feature_counts,
  cv_selected_variables = cv_results$cv_selected_variables,
  cv_selected_miRNA = cv_results$cv_selected_miRNA,
  cv_feature_importance = cv_results$cv_feature_importance,
  cv_summary = cv_results$cv_summary,
  holdout_roc = holdout_results$holdout_roc,
  holdout_predictions = holdout_results$holdout_predictions,
  holdout_summary = holdout_results$holdout_summary,
  final_fold_inputs = holdout_results$final_fold_inputs,
  final_model_output = holdout_results$final_model_output,
  feature_importance = holdout_results$final_model_output$feature_importance
)
```

## Random Forest Out-of-Bag Error by Tree Count

```{r rf_oob_error_curve, echo=FALSE, results='asis', fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
rf_final_oob_error_curve <- holdout_results$final_model_output$oob_error_curve

if (is.null(rf_final_oob_error_curve) || !nrow(rf_final_oob_error_curve)) {
  cat("<p>The final random-forest model did not return OOB error by tree count.</p>\n")
} else {
  rf_optimal_ntree <- holdout_results$final_model_output$optimal_ntree

  if (is.null(rf_optimal_ntree) || !length(rf_optimal_ntree) || !is.finite(rf_optimal_ntree)) {
    rf_optimal_ntree <- rf_final_oob_error_curve$n_trees[[which.min(rf_final_oob_error_curve$oob_error)]]
  }

  rf_optimal_oob_error <- rf_final_oob_error_curve$oob_error[[
    match(rf_optimal_ntree, rf_final_oob_error_curve$n_trees)
  ]]
  rf_best_mtry <- holdout_results$final_model_output$tuning$mtry[[1]]

  write.csv(
    rf_final_oob_error_curve,
    "Tables/Random Forest OOB Error by Tree Count.csv",
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  cat(
    sprintf(
      "<p>For the best random-forest fit at mtry = %d, the first minimum OOB classification error was %.3f at %d trees, and the final random-forest model was refit using that tree count.</p>\n",
      rf_best_mtry,
      rf_optimal_oob_error,
      rf_optimal_ntree
    )
  )

  rf_oob_error_curve_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    rf_final_oob_error_curve,
    ggplot2::aes(x = n_trees, y = oob_error)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#2C7FB8", linewidth = 0.9) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = rf_optimal_ntree, linetype = "dashed", color = "#C65D3B") +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = rf_final_oob_error_curve[
        rf_final_oob_error_curve$n_trees == rf_optimal_ntree,
        ,
        drop = FALSE
      ],
      color = "#C65D3B",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "Random Forest OOB Classification Error by Tree Count",
      subtitle = sprintf("Best mtry = %d; first minimum at %d trees", rf_best_mtry, rf_optimal_ntree),
      x = "Number of Trees",
      y = "Out-of-Bag Classification Error"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal()

  print(rf_oob_error_curve_plot)
}
```

## Final Random Forest Feature Importance

```{r rf_feature_importance_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
rf_feature_importance_table <- holdout_results$final_model_output$feature_importance
rf_feature_importance_table <- rf_feature_importance_table[
  rf_feature_importance_table$variable_type == "miRNA",
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]
rf_feature_importance_table <- utils::head(rf_feature_importance_table, rf_importance_plot_top_n)

if (!nrow(rf_feature_importance_table)) {
  cat("<p>No miRNA feature-importance values were returned by the final random-forest model.</p>\n")
} else {
  cat(
    sprintf(
      "<p>The final random-forest miRNA list keeps the top %d miRNA ranked by %s from the best OOB forest.</p>\n",
      sum(rf_feature_importance_table$selected_for_final),
      rf_feature_importance_table$importance_metric[[1]]
    )
  )

  knitr::kable(
    transform(
      rf_feature_importance_table[
        ,
        c(
          "importance_rank",
          "variable",
          "importance_value",
          "MeanDecreaseAccuracy",
          "MeanDecreaseGini",
          "selected_for_final"
        )
      ],
      selected_for_final = ifelse(selected_for_final, "Yes", "No")
    ),
    format = "html",
    row.names = FALSE,
    digits = 3,
    caption = "Random-forest miRNA feature-importance ranking on the final holdout model"
  )
}
```

```{r rf_feature_importance_plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
plot_feature_importance_ranking(
  holdout_results$final_model_output$feature_importance,
  model_label = "Random Forest",
  top_n = rf_importance_plot_top_n,
  variable_type = "miRNA"
)
```

## Holdout ROC Curve

```{r holdout_roc_plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=6}
plot_model_roc_curve(
  holdout_results$holdout_predictions,
  model_label = "Random Forest",
  dataset_label = "Holdout"
)
```

```{r}

```
